moduleDescription: Note: Import nimsuggest/sexp to use this module

entries.name: SexpEventKind
entries.code:
SexpEventKind = enum
  sexpError,                ## an error occurred during parsing
  sexpEof,                  ## end of file reached
  sexpString,               ## a string literal
  sexpSymbol,               ## a symbol
  sexpInt,                  ## an integer literal
  sexpFloat,                ## a float literal
  sexpNil,                  ## the value ``nil``
  sexpDot,                  ## the dot to separate car/cdr
  sexpListStart,            ## start of a list: the ``(`` token
  sexpListEnd                ## end of a list: the ``)`` token
entries.description: enumeration of all events that may occur when parsing

entries.name: SexpError
entries.code:
SexpError = enum
  errNone,                  ## no error
  errInvalidToken,          ## invalid token
  errParensRiExpected,      ## ``)`` expected
  errQuoteExpected,         ## ``"`` expected
  errEofExpected             ## EOF expected
entries.description: enumeration that lists all errors that can occur

entries.name: SexpParser
entries.code: SexpParser = object of BaseLexer
entries.description: the parser object.

entries.name: close
entries.code:
proc close(my: var SexpParser) {.inline, raises: [IOError, OSError],
                                 tags: [WriteIOEffect], forbids: [].}
entries.description: closes the parser my and its associated input stream.

entries.name: str
entries.code: proc str(my: SexpParser): string {.inline, raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}
entries.description: returns the character data for the events: sexpInt, sexpFloat, sexpString

entries.name: getInt
entries.code:
proc getInt(my: SexpParser): BiggestInt {.inline, raises: [ValueError],
    tags: [], forbids: [].}
entries.description: returns the number for the event: sexpInt

entries.name: getFloat
entries.code:
proc getFloat(my: SexpParser): float {.inline, raises: [ValueError], tags: [],
                                       forbids: [].}
entries.description: returns the number for the event: sexpFloat

entries.name: kind
entries.code:
proc kind(my: SexpParser): SexpEventKind {.inline, raises: [], tags: [],
    forbids: [].}
entries.description: returns the current event type for the SEXP parser

entries.name: getColumn
entries.code: proc getColumn(my: SexpParser): int {.inline, raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}
entries.description: get the current column the parser has arrived at.

entries.name: getLine
entries.code: proc getLine(my: SexpParser): int {.inline, raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}
entries.description: get the current line the parser has arrived at.

entries.name: errorMsg
entries.code:
proc errorMsg(my: SexpParser): string {.raises: [ValueError], tags: [],
                                        forbids: [].}
entries.description: returns a helpful error message for the event sexpError

entries.name: errorMsgExpected
entries.code:
proc errorMsgExpected(my: SexpParser; e: string): string {.raises: [ValueError],
    tags: [], forbids: [].}
entries.description: returns an error message "e expected" in the same format as the other error messages

entries.name: SexpNodeKind
entries.code:
SexpNodeKind = enum
  SNil, SInt, SFloat, SString, SSymbol, SList, SCons
entries.description: possible SEXP node types

entries.name: SexpNode
entries.code: SexpNode = ref SexpNodeObj
entries.description: SEXP node

entries.name: SexpNodeObj
entries.code:
SexpNodeObj {.acyclic.} = object
  case kind*: SexpNodeKind
  of SString:
    str*: string
  of SSymbol:
    symbol*: string
  of SInt:
    num*: BiggestInt
  of SFloat:
    fnum*: float
  of SList:
    elems*: seq[SexpNode]
  of SCons:
  of SNil:
    nil

entries.name: SexpParsingError
entries.code: SexpParsingError = object of ValueError
entries.description: is raised for a SEXP error

entries.name: raiseParseErr
entries.code:
proc raiseParseErr(p: SexpParser; msg: string) {.noinline, noreturn,
    raises: [SexpParsingError, ValueError], tags: [], forbids: [].}
entries.description: raises an ESexpParsingError exception.

Returns default if n is not a SString.

entries.name: getElems

entries.name: getCons

Returns default if n is not a SList.

entries.name: len
entries.code: proc len(n: SexpNode): int {.raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}
entries.description: If n is a SList, it returns the number of elements. If n is a JObject, it returns the number of pairs. Else it returns 0.

entries.code:
proc `[]`(node: SexpNode; index: int): SexpNode {.raises: [], tags: [],
    forbids: [].}
entries.description: Gets the node at index in a List. Result is undefined if index is out of bounds

entries.code: proc `$`(node: SexpNode): string {.raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}
